name: Agent Doctor (self-healer)
description: Continuous self-healing agent. Polls the framework API every 5 min, detects failed or stuck agents, classifies the error signature, applies known auto-fix recipes (token refresh, stale-lock cleanup, transient-network no-op), and escalates anything else by email with full context. Writes durable per-attempt entries to fixes-log.jsonl so future runs avoid retrying the same bad signature.
